must_do.full_text: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time.
must_do.summary: Andrej Karpathy加入Anthropic，将专注LLM前沿研究与R&D工作。这位特斯拉AI负责人的加入标志着Anthropic团队实力进一步增强。

must_do.full_text:
We asked our agents to build a working operating system from scratch using @Antigravity 2.0 and Gemini 3.5 Flash.

It took:
⏱️ 12 hours
🤖 93 parallel sub-agents
🔄 15k+ model requests
🧠 2.6B tokens processed
💸 Less than $1K in API credits

To build a functioning OS from https://t.co/DRwflfF2eK
must_do.summary: Google用Gemini 3.5 Flash和Antigravity 2.0让93个并行子智能体在12小时内从零构建完整操作系统，耗资不足1000美元。展现AI Agent协作的frontier能力。
viral_signals: 终于/第一型选题：首次用AI Agent从零构建OS
angles: 12小时从零到OS：Gemini 3.5 Flash的Agent协作奇迹

不到1000美元构建完整OS，AI成本革命来临

We’re adding new ways for people to identify AI-generated images and understand where they came from. 

In addition to C2PA Content Credentials, images now also contain a SynthID watermark, and can be identified using a public verification tool to check whether an image was made

Introducing Gemini Spark ✨

must_do.full_text:
Transitioning Gemini CLI users to Antigravity CLI

We are unifying our efforts around a single harness and platform, Google Antigravity with four distinct surfaces:

• Antigravity 2.0
• Antigravity CLI
• Antigravity SDK
• Antigravity IDE

This will allow us to move faster and
must_do.summary: Google统一Gemini CLI到Antigravity平台，推出2.0、CLI、SDK、IDE四个界面。开发者工具整合升级。
angles: Google Antigravity四合一：开发者工具大统一
Gemini CLI迁移指南：如何快速上手新平台
开发效率翻倍：Antigravity IDE的四大黑科技

must_do.full_text:
We’ve added two security improvements to Claude Managed Agents. 

Self-hosted sandboxes keep the agent’s execution environment in your infrastructure or with a managed sandbox provider.

MCP tunnels let the agent connect to services inside your security perimeter. https://t.co/h7kvlTdNda
must_do.summary: Claude Managed Agents新增两项安全功能：自托管沙箱和MCP隧道，增强企业级安全性。AI代理安全升级。
angles: Claude Agents安全升级：企业级隔离方案
自托管沙箱+MCP隧道：AI代理的安全堡垒
企业AI部署必看：Claude安全功能全解析

must_do.full_text:
customers are increasingly asking us for certainty on capacity. as models get better, we expect that the world will be capacity-constrained for some time.

we are offering discounted tokens for 1-3 year commits.

(it also helps us plan, so hopefully a big win-win.)
must_do.summary: OpenAI推出1-3年token承诺折扣方案，应对模型升级带来的容量紧张问题。
angles: OpenAI容量告急：企业用户被迫锁定1-3年合约
AI成本新时代：从按需付费到长期承诺
模型升级的代价：容量紧张推高企业成本

「仕様書通りに実装して。
その途中で、仕様書に書かれてなかった判断・変更・妥協点・意思決定を、全部 implementation-notes に残して」

priority.full_text: Andrej @karpathy is back in the game! I would have loved for him to rejoin @OpenAI, but I'm happy he's at any frontier lab pushing the field forward. It’s easy to frame this as zero-sum among the labs, but in truth we’re collectively advancing the most important tech of our era.

priority.full_text:
@broderick @moorehn I work in Academia, and here's the thing:

Companies like Microsoft and Anthropic are paying universities LOADS OF MONEY to add AI to every aspect of university workflows. There's also tax rebates for AI adoption in academia. It fucking sucks.
priority.summary: 学术界人士揭露Microsoft和Anthropic向大学支付巨资推进AI集成，涉及税收激励。AI商业化对教育的影响。
angles: 大科技公司如何用金钱控制高校AI研究

税收激励背后：AI商业化对学术独立性的威胁
